{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322012104A6110A685CEE1BC4F494"}"},"total":2408},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7048234500095329031","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"贼啦好看，作者文笔很好，人物描写形象生动，栩栩如生，我看哭过一次，而且伏笔很多，应该可以写几千章，最好别烂尾，我会一直追下去的，作者加油，别墨迹了，生产队的驴都不敢这么休息，快点码子！！！🎭🎭🎭","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":21,"text":"栩栩如生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741136641BC4F494%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227048234500095329031%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227026781442583563299%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1641044977,"group_id":"7026781442583563299","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个平平无奇的少年罢了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N636/QQEf78ZBQsoGM9T2gE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4867158d6d1141bca4a69e2e74ca4008~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705624&x-signature=uFOaFSBJ5yY2NHRCNE5vdLTqbPA%3D","user_id":"175571611429004","user_name":"hi！"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"175571611429004","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7026781442583563299","book_info":{"abstract":"山海经解封，神魔复苏，欲要奴役蓝星各国。
华夏征战百年，最终被斩了九州龙脉，国运崩塌。
华夏文明即将陷落之际，罪血少年苏宸融合混沌树，重铸九州龙脉，修万里边城，护佑华夏永世不衰。
多年以后，后世子民采访：
“先辈们，为何每至深夜，漫天神魔都要对着华夏叩首跪拜？”
“因为有人曾杀的他们胆寒。”
“嗯？”
“一袭白衣撼青天，九龙抬棺下黄泉，那个背负着罪血之名的少年曾言：华夏入夜，诸神跪安！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/680b39b38abc672c764f225d5ff2df17","author":"曾经是少年","author_id":"","book_id":"7026781442583563299","book_name":"山海经：我为华夏斩神明","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2878人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":875,"name":"山海经","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=875&name=山海经&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7026917657177752064","read_count":"2878","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"339481"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"158","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,山海经","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e00f17bd50ac0067b53160dd9438360e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779297664&x-signature=fNwQ26B89fTuXLdQn64f4L94m3g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1609337704823839","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.1401816e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322012104A6110A685CEE1BC4F494"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11401,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":10685},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7062783489653277448","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说是真的好看，很热血，也很感人！尤其是他们杀那群布衣少年时男主的失望！真的很好看！但是我不是很喜欢有女主的小说，我喜欢男主独自强大的小说！所以拜拜了！但是我会关注作者大大的，如果作者大大写别的小说了，我又会回来的！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1644432446,"group_id":"7026781442583563299","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxdJRSUO8oFneB/HHEIT4Yc=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/40a9008306b14cb6af5546cc424b5c1d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705139&x-signature=j7zTfLH0GZovmnr6Eyy3O%2FXiSfg%3D","user_id":"110677391842","user_name":"啧，好烦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110677391842","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1732941843,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7026781442583563299","book_info":{"abstract":"山海经解封，神魔复苏，欲要奴役蓝星各国。
